rationale: Gov't Code §2001.004 imposes general agency rulemaking and indexing duties. It does not address homestead exemption amounts and does not conflict with the proposed increase.
quote:
In addition to other requirements under law, a state agency shall:
(1) adopt rules of practice stating the nature and requirements of all available formal and informal procedures;
_note: No direct conflict. Agencies administering the exemption would still need to comply with §2001.004 when updating any affected rules, but the statute itself does not impede the proposed change.
